sheet_name: แบบบ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข - แบบบ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 1-10 (ตารางขนาดและราคาก่อสร้าง)
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า71.png
schema_note: This page is a product catalog / pricing index for all 10 house designs in the 'บ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข' government house-design series (of which this house, 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย แบบที่ 2', is one member) - it is not a continuation of the site-planning regulatory text on page 69, and not a drawing/rebar/BOQ page for this specific house. CORRECTED_2026-07-15: classified as 'misc' (taxonomy #14, added during house #1's review, primary_rawjson_schema.md) rather than 'unknown' -- this is exactly the whole-series catalog/promotional case that pattern exists for (matches house #1's หน้า60 precedent), not a genuinely unclassifiable page. Tabular data captured as a clean structured array (house_catalog[]) rather than raw_text since the source table itself is clean and unambiguous. No doc_page footer number is printed on this page (unlike pages 59-70), so doc_page is null.

print_info: พิมพ์ที่: ศูนย์สื่อและสิ่งพิมพ์แก้วเจ้าจอม มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏสวนสุนันทา
warnings: This house (บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 2 / house_no 2 in this table) is house design #2 in the 10-design series, sized 120 ตร.ม., with a pile-foundation cost of 1,460,000 บาท (corrected 2026-07-19, was misread 1,560,000) and a spread-footing cost of 1,381,000 บาท per this catalog page - useful cross-check context but not itself part of this house's own drawing set content.

All 10 price/size cells were individually re-verified via zoomed crops of the source PNG (each Thai-numeral figure read digit-by-digit) after an initial full-page read mis-transcribed house 3's size as 156->'146' and needed correction - all values in this file reflect the zoomed-crop re-verification, not the first-pass read.

House 6 is the one anomaly in the table: its spread-footing cost (1,227,000 บาท) is printed HIGHER than its pile-foundation cost (1,102,000 บาท), unlike all 9 other houses where pile foundation costs more than spread footing - re-confirmed via zoomed crop, not a transcription error; flagged for human review as it may be a printing/source error in the original document.
No rotation needed - this page is normal portrait/landscape reading orientation, not a split double-sheet scan like pages 59-68.
